title: Ordnance Factory Khamaria Recruitment 2026 - Walk-in-Interview for Various Medical Practitioner Posts
description: Ordnance Factory Khamaria has declared the official notification for 2026. To fill up the vacancies for various Medical Practitioner Jobs. Candidates who have qualified in the MBBS can grab this chance and apply for the Ordnance Factory Khamaria Recruitment 2026 . Here we included the age limit, selection process, salary structure, education details, applciation fee, and how to apply for these posts. If you are looking for more, here is a list of Government jobs in 2026 that you can all apply...
